action: llms.txt update + /start CLI fix + README CTA reroute
summary: Updated llms.txt/llms-full.txt with 2 missing blog posts + /start page. Fixed invented CLI syntax on /start page (ralph init→ralph --init). Rerouted README CTA from old blog post to /start on Codeberg, GitHub, and PyPI.
fixes_applied: Removed non-standard <link rel="llms.txt"> from homepage head
Corrected /start page CLI syntax: ralph init→ralph --init, ralph plan→ralph --diagnose, ralph run→ralph
Corrected example spec from ralph deploy --dry-run (invented) to ralph --dry-run
Added CI/CD pipeline and Docker install posts to llms.txt and llms-full.txt
Routed README CTA (most-viewed asset on Codeberg/GitHub/PyPI) to /start conversion page
